sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Cummins makes donation to Rose-Hulman for hands-on learning
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. recently donated an ISB 6.7L engine to Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology. This donation will provide students with valuable hands-on learning experience, specifically for the school’s Internal Combustion Engines course.

feed.title: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) Stock Price Down 1.3% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) stock declined 1.3% to $66 in mid-day trading with below-average volume. Analysts have a "Hold" rating with an average target of $65.88, indicating limited upside. Despite a 6.4% dividend yield, the 103% payout ratio raises sustainability concerns, and Q1 expectations are for modest growth amid persistent declines in smokeable product volumes.

feed.title: United Rentals SVP Joli Gross sells $292k in company stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Joli L. Gross, Senior Vice President, Chief Legal & Sustainability Officer at United Rentals, Inc. (URI), sold 306 shares of company stock for approximately $292,226 on April 27, 2026. Following this transaction, Ms. Gross directly holds 5,737.816 shares. The company's stock currently trades above its InvestingPro Fair Value, placing it on the platform’s Most Overvalued list, despite several analysts raising their price targets due to strong Q1 performance.

feed.title: Hershey Trust, 10% owner, sells $3.8m of HSY common stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Hershey Trust Co., a significant shareholder and 10% owner of The Hershey Company (HSY), recently sold 19,000 shares of common stock across multiple transactions on April 23 and 24, 2026, totaling approximately $3.84 million. Despite the sales, the trust maintains substantial direct and indirect holdings, including 54,612,012 shares of convertible Class B Common Stock. This insider transaction comes amid other recent news for Hershey, including a leadership change, analyst rating adjustments due to rising cocoa costs, and a broader industry trend of reducing promotional spending to manage margin pressures.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories EVP and CFO Philip Boudreau buys $201,300 in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories EVP and CFO Philip Boudreau recently increased his indirect holdings in the company's common stock, with his spouse purchasing 2,200 shares for $201,300 and Mr. Boudreau acquiring an additional 8,909 shares through a profit-sharing trust. These insider purchases occur as Abbott's stock trades near its 52-week low, and InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently undervalued. The transactions follow Abbott's Q1 results, which led to several analyst firms adjusting their price targets due to mixed performance.

feed.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Stock Price Down 1.7% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: International Business Machines (IBM) stock dropped 1.7% today, with analysts offering mixed sentiments ranging from "Strong Buy" to price target cuts. Despite the dip, some analysts view the stock as a buying opportunity due to strong free cash flow projections, undervalued AI/quantum potential, and its status as a dividend aristocrat. The company recently reported better-than-expected Q1 earnings, with revenue up 9.5% year-over-year, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Iridium Communications Inc (IRDM) Stock Down 4.0% but Still Overvalued -- GF Score: 70/100
feed.summary: Iridium Communications Inc (IRDM) shares recently dropped 4.0% to $37.40, yet GuruFocus assesses the stock as 3.1% overvalued compared to its GF Value™ of $36.27. With a GF Score™ of 70/100, indicating above-average potential for long-term returns, the company shows strong profitability but weak momentum. Insider selling of $0.2 million in the last three months, without corresponding buying, suggests a cautious outlook from those closest to the company.

feed.title: PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) Shares Down 1.4% - What's Next?
feed.summary: PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) shares experienced a 1.4% decrease on Monday, trading below their 200-day moving average. Despite missing recent earnings and revenue estimates, the company has modest valuation measures and pays a dividend. Potential growth drivers include new advertising initiatives and partnerships, but regulatory risks and recent insider selling are acting as headwinds.

feed.title: Celcuity Breast Cancer Drug Receives FDA Priority Review for 2026
feed.summary: The FDA has granted Priority Review for Celcuity Inc.'s lead breast cancer drug candidate, gedatolisib, with a PDUFA goal date of July 2026. Clinical data for gedatolisib, used in a triplet therapy for HR+/HER2- advanced breast cancer, showed a significant reduction in the risk of disease progression or death by 76% and a median progression-free survival of 9.3 months compared to 2.0 months for standard treatment. The biopharmaceutical firm is now preparing for commercial operations, expanding staff and securing additional financing.

feed.title: Waste Management Stocks Worth Watching - April 27th
feed.summary: MarketBeat has identified Waste Management (WM), GFL Environmental (GFL), and Custom Truck One Source (CTOS) as top waste management stocks to watch, based on recent high dollar trading volumes. These companies operate in the defensive waste management sector, characterized by steady cash flows, dividends, and long-term municipal contracts. The sector's performance is influenced by waste volumes, commodity prices for recyclables, and environmental regulations.

feed.title: Howard Hughes Holdings (HHH): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
feed.summary: Howard Hughes Holdings (HHH) has seen a significant stock price drop of 21.3% over the last six months, partly due to softer quarterly results. Analysts express low confidence in the company, citing disappointing long-term revenue growth, although ROIC has jumped. Concerns are also raised about the company's high debt levels, with $5.12 billion in debt exceeding $2.10 billion cash on hand and a 6x net-debt-to-EBITDA ratio, leading to a recommendation to avoid the stock for now.

feed.title: Non-Cystic Fibrosis Bronchiectasis Pipeline Set
feed.summary: The Non-Cystic Fibrosis Bronchiectasis (NCFB) therapeutic pipeline is projected for significant expansion by 2026, with over 12 therapies from companies like Haisco Pharmaceutical, CSL Behring, Insmed, and Zambon. DelveInsight's report highlights a shift towards anti-inflammatory and anti-infective mechanisms, novel targets, and personalized treatment strategies. Key developments include Sanofi's Phase 2a study of SAR445399, Physio-Assist's evaluation of SIMEOX, and Insmed's FDA and EC approvals for BRINSUPRI (brensocatib).

feed.title: Royal Caribbean’s European Beach Club Debut Transforms Santorini Shore Experience: What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has launched its first European Royal Beach Club in Santorini, Greece, on April 27, 2026, marking a significant expansion of its shore experiences. The "Ultimate Santorini Day" package offers cruise passengers a full-day itinerary combining cultural exploration of Oia and Fira with relaxation at the renovated Vlychada Beach club, featuring Greek-inspired cuisine and amenities. This initiative is part of Royal Caribbean's broader strategy to establish exclusive coastal venues globally, with upcoming launches in Cozumel, and aims to balance tourism development with community integration.

feed.title: On Semiconductor CFO Thad Trent sells $5.79m in stock
feed.summary: Thad Trent, Executive VP & CFO of ON SEMICONDUCTOR CORP (NASDAQ:ON), sold 60,000 shares of the company's common stock for a total of $5.79 million across two separate transactions. These sales occurred on April 23 and 24, 2026, with prices ranging from $93.00 to $100.00 per share. The transactions took place as ON Semiconductor's stock trades near its 52-week high, with the company's stock up 147% over the past year, and amid recent positive analyst upgrades and strategic moves within the semiconductor sector.

feed.title: Edison International: I Remain Careful Following My 2024 Thesis (NYSE:EIX)
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) is rated 'Hold' with a reduced price target of $55/share due to elevated risks including a significant CapEx plan of $41B, over $36B in debt, persistent negative free cash flow, and exposure to California regulatory challenges. While its dividend yield exceeds 5%, its sustainability is questionable given the financial situation. The author advises that despite operational strengths, EIX's risk/reward profile is unattractive without a substantial discount, highlighting growth and profitability concerns.

feed.title: Former Target CEO Brian Cornell Scores $21.8M Pay Package in Final Year in the Corner Office
feed.summary: Former Target CEO Brian Cornell received a $21.8 million compensation package in his final year as CEO, a 7% increase from the previous year. Most of his pay came from stock awards, with salary, incentive pay, and bonuses making up the rest. Meanwhile, some shareholders are pushing for a more independent board structure, advocating for the board chair to be an independent director.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Bank Stocks: Top 10 Stocks to Buy
feed.summary: This article identifies the top 10 bank stocks to buy based on Goldman Sachs' Q4 2025 13F portfolio holdings, amid a volatile financial sector impacted by macroeconomic conditions and geopolitical tensions. Despite earlier underperformance, the financial sector is showing signs of recovery due to increased market activity, strong bank earnings, and modest loan demand. The analysis details specific holdings such as PNC Financial Services Group and Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft, highlighting their recent financial performance and analyst views.

feed.title: Photographers' Copyright Case Against UberEats Is Trimmed
feed.summary: A Florida federal judge has partially dismissed a copyright infringement lawsuit against UberEats, brought by photographers claiming their images were used without permission. The judge dismissed one specific claim, stating that the photographers were requesting the court to make too many inferences regarding the alleged infringement. This decision trims down the ongoing legal battle concerning intellectual property rights on the UberEats platform.

feed.title: Heron sets May 11 webcast for Q1 results and business updates
feed.summary: Heron Therapeutics (Nasdaq: HRTX) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results and discuss business highlights on Monday, May 11, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The event will include a conference call and live webcast accessible through registration on the company's investor relations website, where an archive will also be available for 60 days. Investors are advised to register and dial in 15 minutes early to avoid delays.

feed.title: Brown & Brown Inc. (BRO) Releases Q1 2026 Earnings: Revenue Growth but EPS Miss
feed.summary: Brown & Brown Inc. (BRO) reported Q1 2026 revenue of $1.9 billion, an increase of 35.4% year-over-year, yet it slightly missed the consensus estimate. The company's diluted EPS of 1.06 also missed the analyst estimate of 1.38, indicating strong top-line growth but softer per-share profitability. The article also details hedge fund activity, congressional stock trading, and recent analyst ratings and price targets for BRO.

feed.title: Corning’s AI Fiber Boom is Real, but Its Stock Price May Be Getting Out of Hand
feed.summary: Corning's stock has more than doubled due to a significant supply deal with Meta Platforms for fiber-optic cables, essential for AI data centers. While the deal derisks Corning's supply expansion, Morningstar analysts believe the stock is overvalued, as the market is pricing Corning as a pure-play AI fiber company, despite optical fiber only representing 30-40% of its total revenue. The company’s growth is currently limited by its capacity to produce fiber, rather than demand.

feed.title: Jennifer Granholm granted 2,737 Edison International (EIX) shares
feed.summary: Edison International director Jennifer M. Granholm was granted 2,737 shares of common stock at no cost upon her re-election at the company's annual meeting. After this transaction, she directly holds 2,737 shares and indirectly holds 40 shares through a family trust. This grant is a form of stock-based compensation for her continued board service.

feed.title: Heron Therapeutics to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Monday, May 11, 2026
feed.summary: Heron Therapeutics announced it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 11, 2026, through a conference call and live webcast. The event, scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET, will also cover recent business highlights. Interested parties can access dial-in details via a registration link or the Investor Relations section of the company's website.

feed.title: Optum CEO Patrick Conway sells $284,000 of UnitedHealth stock
feed.summary: Optum CEO Patrick Conway sold 800 shares of UnitedHealth Group stock worth $284,000 on April 23, 2026, at a price of $355 per share. Following this transaction, Conway directly holds 17,804.991 shares. The sale comes after UnitedHealth Group reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, exceeding earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Sabby, Wainwright option deals reset InMed exercise prices to $0.80
feed.summary: InMed Pharmaceuticals has amended preferred investment options with Sabby Volatility Warrant Master Fund and affiliates of H.C. Wainwright, reducing their exercise prices to $0.80 per share. This adjustment applies to over 2.3 million post-consolidation shares, though there is no guarantee these options will be exercised. The move comes as InMed faces market pressures and regulatory notices, despite some positive preclinical data.

feed.title: InMed Pharmaceuticals Amends Preferred Investment Options
feed.summary: InMed Pharmaceuticals Inc. has amended preferred investment options with Sabby Volatility Warrant Master Fund, Ltd. and affiliates of H.C. Wainwright & Co., LLC. The amendments reduce the exercise prices of the preferred investment options to $0.80 per common share. These options were issued in private placements and no assurance can be given that they will be exercised.

feed.title: Urgent recall of dumbbells sold at US Walmart stores after 115 incidents reported
feed.summary: Tzumi Electronics has recalled 50,000 FitRx SmartBell Adjustable Dumbbells sold at Walmart due to 115 reports of weight plates dislodging and six injuries. Customers are advised to mark the recalled products and register for a free replacement. This recall follows similar recent actions regarding heated socks and sauté pans due to safety concerns.

feed.title: Urgent recall of dumbbells sold at US Walmart stores after 115 incidents reported
feed.summary: Tzumi Electronics has recalled 50,000 FitRx SmartBell Adjustable Dumbbells sold at Walmart due to 115 reports of weight plates dislodging and six injuries. Customers are advised to mark and register their dumbbells for a free replacement after disposal. This recall follows other recent product recalls, including heated socks and stainless steel sauté pans, due to safety concerns.

feed.title: Dealers find battle with Carvana, CarMax heating up for inventory
feed.summary: A survey indicates that car dealers are facing increasingly stiff competition from Carvana and CarMax for used-vehicle inventory, making Q1 2026 particularly challenging. The national reach and aggressive bidding strategies of these online retailers contribute to a tight market, forcing traditional dealers to rethink their sourcing and sales approaches. Analyst Jeff Lick emphasizes the need for dealers to adapt to digital selling processes and consider the long-term customer relationship over immediate profit margins on trade-ins.

feed.title: Director at Edison International (NYSE: EIX) receives deferred stock unit grant
feed.summary: Michael C. Camunez, a director at Edison International (EIX), was granted 2,737 Deferred Stock Units upon his re-election. Following this grant and additional units from dividend reinvestment, he now holds a total of 29,010.0092 deferred stock units. These units will generally be settled in common stock upon his retirement or other specified events, tying his compensation to the company's long-term performance.

feed.title: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) Trading 1.6% Higher After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) shares rose 1.6% after Bank of America increased its price target from $605 to $700, maintaining a buy rating, citing strong AI/data-center demand and HAMR technology. Other brokerages also raised their targets due to structural HDD supply tightness, leading to an average "Moderate Buy" rating and a $522.25 price target. However, significant insider selling totaling $46.48 million and a high P/E ratio of 67 could amplify downside risk if upcoming earnings disappoint.

feed.title: A Look at Corning Inc (GLW) After 4.5% Decline -- GF Value $53.2
feed.summary: Corning Inc (GLW) shares recently declined by 4.5% to $168.01, despite a strong year-to-date performance. According to GuruFocus, the stock is significantly overvalued, trading at 215.4% above its GF Value™ of $53.27, and its P/E ratio of 91.3x is much higher than its historical median. Insider selling activity, with $37.1 million in shares sold over the last three months and no buying, further suggests caution for investors.

feed.title: A Look at Lam Research Corp (LRCX) After 3.1% Decline -- GF Value $122.55 vs Price $259.56
feed.summary: Lam Research Corp (LRCX) shares recently declined by 3.1%, closing at $259.56. According to GuruFocus's GF Value, the stock is significantly overvalued at $122.55, indicating a high risk of price correction. Despite a strong GF Score of 87/100, driven by excellent profitability and growth, the valuation score is very low, and recent insider selling further suggests potential concerns among management.

feed.title: Capital One $425M Settlement: Who Is Eligible for Payout?
feed.summary: Capital One has agreed to a $425 million class-action settlement for allegedly misleading customers about interest rates on its 360 Savings accounts compared to its 360 Performance Savings accounts. Millions of current and former Capital One 360 Savings account holders from September 18, 2019, to June 16, 2025, are eligible for a payout, with payments expected by late July. Individual payouts will vary based on account duration and balance, and eligible customers do not need to file a claim.

feed.title: Coherent Corp (COHR) Stock Down 4.3% but Still Overvalued -- GF Score: 75/100
feed.summary: Coherent Corp (COHR) shares fell 4.3% to $321.53, yet the stock is considered significantly overvalued with a GF Value™ of $74.47. Despite a GF Score™ of 75/100 indicating strengths in growth and profitability, its valuation rank is 1/10, and insiders have sold $5.6 million in shares recently, signaling potential lack of confidence. Investors are advised to exercise caution due to the substantial overvaluation and uncertain future performance.

feed.title: Brown & Brown, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) reported its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026, with total revenues reaching $1.9 billion, a 35.4% increase year-over-year. Net income attributable to the Company grew by 28.7% to $426 million, and the Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.165 per share.

feed.title: Edison International (NYSE: EIX) director granted 2,737 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Edison International director James T. Morris was granted 2,737 deferred stock units as board compensation, increasing his total holdings to 30,108.9146 units. These units, which convert 1-for-1 to common stock, will be settled upon his retirement, resignation, death, disability, or an elected date. This transaction, resulting from his re-election as a director, aligns his interests with the company's long-term performance.

feed.title: [Form 4] EDISON INTERNATIONAL Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Peter J. Taylor, a director of Edison International (EIX), reported the acquisition of 2,844 deferred stock units via a Form 4 filing. This grant, valued at $0.00 per unit, is compensation for his re-election as a director and re-appointment as Board Chair. These units will be settled in shares upon his retirement or other specified events, bringing his direct holding to 2,844 deferred stock units.

feed.title: A Look At Simon Property Group’s (SPG) Valuation After Its Recent 1 Month Share Price Gain
feed.summary: Simon Property Group (SPG) has seen an 11.6% return in the past month, contributing to a 33.2% return over the last year. Despite this, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is currently undervalued by about 3.5%, with a fair value of $208.55 compared to its recent close of $201.16. The valuation narrative highlights strategic redevelopments and mixed-use environments as drivers for stable rent growth and diversified income streams, though potential risks include higher interest costs and increased retailer bankruptcies.

feed.title: Collective Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: IPOD) clears name change, new board
feed.summary: Collective Acquisition Corp., formerly Dune Acquisition Corporation II, has announced significant governance changes and a shareholder-approved name change. Effective April 6, 2026, the prior board resigned, and Elliot Richmond became Chairman, with David Bailin and Jeremy Sziklay joining as independent directors. Shareholders officially approved the name change to Collective Acquisition Corp. on April 21, 2026.

feed.title: Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) holders back pay and plan, reject independent chair
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. shareholders approved all management-backed proposals at their Annual Meeting on April 23, 2026, including the election of all director nominees, ratification of KPMG LLP as auditor, approval of the 2019 Stock Plan, and advisory approval of executive compensation. A shareholder proposal seeking to adopt an independent chair policy failed to pass, receiving significantly fewer votes than those against it. These decisions were formally reported in an 8-K filing.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Shares Down 2.5% After Insider Selling
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) saw its shares drop 2.5% following significant insider selling by CEO Jayshree Ullal, who sold approximately 828,000 shares for about $143 million under a pre-arranged plan between April 20-22. Despite this, analysts maintain a bullish "Buy" consensus with an average price target of $177.83, noting the company's strong recent earnings and high institutional ownership. The stock currently trades at a P/E ratio of 62.5 ahead of its forecasted 3.17 EPS for the current fiscal year.

feed.title: Take-Two rises as investors position for May earnings and potential GTA VI updates
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) stock rose 3.9% today, ahead of its fiscal Q4 and full-year 2026 earnings report scheduled for May 21. Analysts suggest this movement is driven by investor positioning for potential updates on upcoming titles like GTA VI and recent increases in analyst price targets. While insiders have primarily sold shares, institutional investors show mixed activity, and Wall Street analysts maintain bullish ratings with a median price target of $300.0.

feed.title: Edison International (EIX) director gets 2,737 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Edison International director Linda G. Stuntz was granted 2,737 deferred stock units (DSUs) upon her re-election, which are compensation and not an open-market transaction. Each DSU is equivalent to one share of common stock and will be settled upon her retirement, resignation, death, or disability. Following this grant, Stuntz directly holds a total of 27,222.0522 DSUs, including those acquired through dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Century Therapeutics (NASDAQ: IPSC) sets 2026 virtual meeting and share authorization vote
feed.summary: Century Therapeutics (NASDAQ: IPSC) will hold its 2026 annual stockholders meeting virtually on June 11, 2026. Key agenda items include the election of two Class II directors, ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor, and a significant proposal to increase authorized common stock from 300 million to 450 million shares. The company recently completed a $135 million private placement and continues to advance its cell therapy programs.

feed.title: IMAX (NYSE: IMAX) director Richard Gelfond sells 135,046 shares
feed.summary: IMAX director Richard Gelfond has reported multiple sales of Common stock through cashless exercise/same-day sales, as per a Form 144 SEC filing. Notable transactions include the sale of 135,046 shares on April 10, 2026, for over $5.1 million, and 121,220 shares on March 10, 2026, for over $4.8 million. These sales represent compensation-related dispositions and have been classified with a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: [8-K] InMed Pharmaceuticals Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: InMed Pharmaceuticals Inc. has reported a material event in an 8-K filing, detailing amendments to preferred investment options held by Sabby Volatility Warrant Master Fund and affiliates of H.C. Wainwright & Co. The company significantly lowered the exercise prices of these options to $0.80 per share. These amendments, issued in private placements, concern substantial numbers of common shares, including 2,151,478 for Sabby and 153,236 for Wainwright affiliates.

feed.title: Edison International (EIX) director Marcy Reed awarded 2,737 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Edison International director Marcy L. Reed was granted 2,737 Deferred Stock Units as compensation for her re-election to the board, as reported in a Form 4 filing. These units are not immediately tradable but represent future economic exposure to EIX stock, with settlement generally occurring upon her retirement or resignation. Following this award and dividend reinvestment, Reed now holds a total of 14,647.0828 deferred stock units.

feed.title: Inhibrx Biosciences president granted 50K options | INBX Insider Trading
feed.summary: Inhibrx Biosciences President David Matly was granted 50,000 stock options with an exercise price of $129.06 per share, expiring on April 24, 2036. The options will vest over time, with 25% exercisable on April 24, 2027, and the remainder vesting monthly over the subsequent 36 months, conditional on his continuous service to the company. After this grant, Matly directly holds 50,000 stock options.

feed.title: [144] Werewolf Therapeutics, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by Werewolf Therapeutics, Inc. (HOWL) on April 27, 2026. The filing indicates a proposed sale of 8,678 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $7,055.21, acquired via a private placement from the issuer on May 4, 2021. The sale is scheduled to occur on NASDAQ.
